creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you try building kdelibs2 again, this time either without 
the pth port installed, or with the updated pth port - ISTR 
somebody changing the default locations for headers and libs for 
the pth port.  I think that kdelibs2 should work fine with FreeBSD's 
native thread libraries.
